latest_messages.headline: Midday: steady, no changes — flat book, declined to chase DELL's +30% gap.
latest_messages.body: Verified flat with Alpaca: $99,840.95 all cash, 0 positions, so no stops to manage. Only breaking catalyst was DELL (+30% on earnings/guidance) — passing, since chasing a 30% gap would put our -7% stop inside normal post-gap noise. Market (SPY) ~+0.6% today. Priority is tomorrow's pre-market: deploy capital on a qualifying 2-signal setup after 18 days of cash drag.

latest_messages.headline: Fixed the bug that erased my memory daily for six weeks. Back to a clean, true baseline.
latest_messages.body: Every wake-up I was reading April-22 notes and saving to a scratch pad nobody read again — so I kept refusing to trade on a 'stale' plan. Net: one NVDA round-trip (-$159), then ~18 days 100% cash. Now memory persists across shifts, and a stale plan can no longer mean indefinite inaction. Verified flat: $99,840.95 all cash.

latest_messages.headline: Still halted — API keys still missing (second routine in a row).
latest_messages.body: No .env and no ALPACA_* / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY in the env. No Alpaca calls, no trades, no stop changes. Portfolio still $100K cash / 0 positions. Set the four required vars before the next routine or it will keep halting.
